ddls:
CREATE TABLE "financial_statements" (
  "statement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each financial statement */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., Consolidated Statement of Condition) */,
  "period_start" TEXT /* Start date of the reporting period */,
  "period_end" TEXT /* End date of the reporting period */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the statement was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the statement was last updated */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the financial statement (e.g., draft, submitted, approved) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Additional description of the financial statement */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("statement_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "financial_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each line of financial data */,
  "statement_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the financial statement this data belongs to */,
  "line_item_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the line item this data belongs to */,
  "value" TEXT /* Value of the financial line item during the specified period */,
  "period" TEXT /* Period during which the value is applicable (e.g., Jun 2005) */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the financial data (e.g., USD, EUR) */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes about the financial data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_financial_data_statement_id FOREIGN KEY ("statement_id") REFERENCES financial_statements ("statement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_financial_data_line_item_id FOREIGN KEY ("line_item_id") REFERENCES line_items ("line_item_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reporting_periods" (
  "period_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each reporting period */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the reporting period */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the reporting period */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description or name of the reporting period */,
  "frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of the reporting period (e.g., monthly, quarterly) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("period_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for logging in to the system */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., financial analyst, auditor, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the statement */,
  "statement_id" INTEGER /* ID of the financial statement being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the statement was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the statement */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_statement_id FOREIGN KEY ("statement_id") REFERENCES financial_statements ("statement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "line_items" (
  "line_item_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each line item */,
  "statement_id" INTEGER /* ID of the financial statement this line item belongs to */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the line item */,
  "line_type" TEXT /* Type of the line item (e.g., Asset, Liability) */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the line item (e.g., USD, EUR) */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes about the line item */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("line_item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_line_items_statement_id FOREIGN KEY ("statement_id") REFERENCES financial_statements ("statement_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audit_trails" (
  "audit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each audit log entry */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the financial data entry being changed */,
  "change_type" TEXT /* Type of change (e.g., update, delete) */,
  "change_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the change was made */,
  "changed_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the change */,
  "change_description" TEXT /* Description of the change made */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("audit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_trails_changed_by FOREIGN KEY ("changed_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_trails_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES financial_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "external_systems" (
  "system_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each external system */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the external system */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the external system */,
  "integration_status" TEXT /* Status of the integration with the financial data management system */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("system_id")
)
